title: VoidTagger
description: A tier tagger made by frqme for IL void tiers network
body:
# 🌌 VoidTagger

**The ultimate client-side mod for displaying VoidTiers PvP rankings in Minecraft!**

VoidTagger seamlessly integrates with the [VoidTiers](https://discord.gg/voidtiers) tier testing system, displaying player ranks above their heads and providing detailed profile lookups directly in-game.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🏷️ **Live Tier Display**
- See **Crystal** and **Mace** PvP tiers floating above players' heads
- Color-coded tier indicators (HT1 through LT5)
- Automatic detection of the highest tier per player
- Smooth, non-intrusive nametag integration
- **Adaptive Mode** - Automatically shows Mace tier when available, falls back to Crystal when not

### 📊 **In-Game Profile Lookup**
Use `/tiers <player>` or `/profile <player>` to instantly view:
- 💎 **Crystal PvP** rank
- 🪓 **Mace PvP** rank  
- ⭐ **Overall** highest tier
- 👤 Linked Discord account
- 🚀 Server Booster status
- 🧪 Tester information
- 📅 Last tested date
- 🌍 Preferred testing server

### 🎨 **Custom Tier Icons**
- Beautiful custom-rendered icons for Crystal, Mace, and Overall tiers
- Authentic VoidTiers branding throughout

### ⚙️ **Fully Configurable**
- Press **O** to open the config menu
- Toggle tier display above heads
- Show/hide your own tier
- Customize display preferences

### 🚀 **Performance First**
- Async data fetching - **zero lag** while playing
- Smart caching system to minimize API calls
- Lightweight footprint

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/tiers` | View your own profile |
| `/tiers <player>` | View another player's profile |
| `/profile` | Alias for `/tiers` |
| `/profile <player>` | Alias for `/tiers <player>` |
| `/void toggle` | Toggle mod on/off |
| `/void toggleicons` | Toggle icons on/off |
| `/void toggletab` | Toggle tablist on/off |
| `/void toggleself` | Toggle own nametag display |
| `/void displaymode` | Cycle display mode (Adaptive → Mace → Crystal) |
| `/void position` | Toggle tier position (Left ↔ Right) |
| `/void clear` | Clear all cached data |
| `/void help` | Show all commands |

### 🎯 Display Modes

| Mode | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| **Adaptive** (Default) | Shows Mace tier if available, otherwise shows Crystal tier |
| **Mace** | Always shows Mace tier |
| **Crystal** | Always shows Crystal tier |

---

## 🎮 Usage

1. **Install** the mod (requires Fabric Loader & Fabric API)
2. **Launch** Minecraft
3. **Press O** to open the config screen
4. **Type** `/tiers <username>` to look up any VoidTiers player
5. Use `/void displaymode` to switch between Adaptive, Mace, or Crystal mode
6. Tiers automatically appear above players' heads in-game!

---

## 🏆 Supported Tiers

| Tier | Color |
|------|-------|
| **HT1** | 🟡 Gold |
| **LT1** | 🟨 Yellow |
| **HT2** | ⬜ White |
| **LT2** | ◽ Light Gray |
| **HT3** | 🟠 Orange |
| **LT3** | 🟧 Dark Orange |
| **HT4** | 🟪 Purple |
| **LT4** | 🟣 Dark Purple |
| **HT5** | 🩷 Pink |
| **LT5** | ⬛ Dark Gray |

---

## 🔧 Requirements

- ✅ **Minecraft 1.21.x**
- ✅ **Fabric Loader 0.19+**
- ✅ **Fabric API**
- ✅ **Java 21**

---

## 🌐 About VoidTiers

VoidTiers is a competitive Crystal and Mace PvP tier testing community. Get tested, climb the ranks, and showcase your skill!

🔗 **Join the Discord:** [discord](https://discord.gg/YgWxv3e6Gg)

---


---

## 📝 Credits

- **Developer:** Frqme
---

### ⚡ **Install now and bring VoidTiers to life in your Minecraft world!** ⚡

---

*VoidTagger is a fan-made client-side mod and is not officially affiliated with Mojang Studios. All rankings are sourced from the official VoidTiers database made by me.*
